text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D, Version 2 │ May 2026 │ V 1.2 62 

ZIP_CD 

LABEL: Five-digit ZIP Code for Beneficiary 

DESCRIPTION: This field specifies the zip code identified as the beneficiary mailing address. 

LONG NAME: ZIP_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 5 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 

VALUES: Five-digit zip 

COMMENT: In some cases, the code may not be the actual state where the beneficiary resides. CMS
